architecture_complexity.rationale: Architecture unknown; 3rd-party CRM limits refactoring options

key_risk_factors: WebSphere 7.0 EOL since 2015 — critical security exposure
RHEL 7 EOL creates OS-level security gap
3rd party software limits customization and migration options
8 external interfaces require careful re-integration testing
Java 11 outdated; upgrade to Java 21 needed
modernization_notes: CRMApp-002 should prioritize WebSphere replacement and OS upgrade. As 3rd-party software, vendor roadmap alignment is critical before planning any major modernization.
